name: Brain MRI Multiple Sclerosis Protocol
description: Brain MRI protocol for multiple sclerosis evaluation with FLAIR, T1, and magnetization transfer imaging

findings.technique: MRI brain with MS protocol including sagittal FLAIR, axial T1, T2, FLAIR, and post-contrast sequences.
findings.comparison: No prior MRI studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Periventricular
sections.content: No periventricular white matter lesions. No demyelinating plaques adjacent to lateral ventricles.

sections.name: Juxtacortical
sections.content: No juxtacortical lesions. No lesions involving the subcortical U-fibers.

sections.name: Infratentorial
sections.content: Posterior fossa is [unremarkable / no lesions in the brainstem or cerebellum]. No lesions in the corpus callosum.

sections.name: Post-Contrast
sections.content: No enhancing lesions. No active demyelination with contrast enhancement.

impression:
1. No plaques of multiple sclerosis identified.
2. No demyelinating lesions.
3. Normal MS protocol study.
author: RadReport Templates
